title: Sterile Processing Technician
description: Moderna is recruiting a Sterile Processing Technician to support our clinical and research operations in Research Triangle Park. You'll ensure that all surgical instruments and equipment are properly sterilized and maintained, supporting the precision required in biotechnology research. This hybrid role offers flexibility while maintaining critical on-site responsibilities.
responsibilities: Decontaminate, process, and sterilize surgical instruments and medical equipment using various sterilization methods
Inspect instruments for damage and functionality; perform preventive maintenance and repairs as needed
Organize and maintain inventory of sterile supplies and instruments; track usage and reorder as required
Maintain detailed records of sterilization cycles and equipment maintenance
Ensure compliance with CDC guidelines and laboratory safety standards

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; completion of sterile processing technician program

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and hearing coverage
